pi_items.source: Task description and metadata consistent; 'Sarah' is a common English first name used in test data
Task description and metadata consistent; 'Johnson' is a very common English surname, frequently used in test data generation per common testing practices
Task description and metadata consistent; uses 'example.com' domain which is reserved per RFC 2606 for testing and documentation purposes
Web search confirmed 'General' is the default customer group (group_id 1) in Magento 2 and 2.4.7; verified against Magento 2.4.7 installation in this environment

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values are verified. The task creates a synthetic customer named Sarah Johnson (sarah.johnson@example.com) in the General customer group in Magento 2.4.7 admin. All values are legitimate test data: 'Sarah' and 'Johnson' are common English names used in test data, 'example.com' is an RFC 2606-reserved domain for testing, and 'General' is the standard default customer group in Magento 2.4.7 (group_id 1). No external data sources are used; all values are hardcoded task specifications.
